content.heading: Original Content
content.text: All original written content on VeteransLedger — including editorial text, biographical summaries, campaign analyses, article body text, translations, annotations, and structural organisation — is the copyright of VeteransLedger and its contributors, © 2026. All rights reserved unless otherwise stated.

content.heading: Historical and Public Domain Materials
content.text: This archive reproduces historical documents, photographs, military records, and personal correspondence that are in the public domain by virtue of their age, their origin as government publications, or the expiry of applicable copyright terms. Works first published before 1 January 1929 are generally in the public domain in the United States under 17 U.S.C. § 305. We make good-faith determinations regarding the public domain status of all reproduced materials. If you believe we have incorrectly assessed the status of a specific work, please contact us.

content.heading: Fair Use
content.text: Where materials are not in the public domain, their reproduction on this archive is made under the doctrine of fair use (17 U.S.C. § 107) for purposes of historical commentary, scholarship, criticism, and education. Our use is: (1) transformative and educational in purpose; (2) non-commercial; (3) limited in the amount reproduced relative to the whole work; and (4) does not substitute for the original market for the work. We include appropriate attribution for all such materials.

content.heading: Attribution Standards
content.text: We attribute all reproduced materials to the best of our knowledge. Attribution is provided by source archive, collection, or publisher where known. Where attribution cannot be established with certainty, we note the uncertainty. We are committed to correcting attribution errors when they are brought to our attention.

content.heading: Photographs and Images
content.text: Photographs used on this site fall into one of the following categories: (1) Public domain images originating from wartime military or government sources, now in the public domain. (2) Images obtained under licence permitting educational reproduction. (3) Original assets created for this archive. We do not claim ownership of public domain materials; our presentation and selection constitute original editorial work.

content.heading: Your Use of Archive Content
content.text: Original VeteransLedger content (editorial text, summaries, analyses, and translations) may be shared for non-commercial educational or research purposes, provided that clear attribution is given to VeteransLedger with a link to the source URL. Such use must not misrepresent the original content or remove attribution. Systematic reproduction, database extraction, commercial licensing, or publication of our original content in any medium without written permission is strictly prohibited.

content.heading: Copyright Infringement Claims (DMCA)
content.text: If you believe that material on this site infringes your copyright, please send a written notice to VeteransLedger@gmail.com containing: (1) identification of the copyrighted work you claim has been infringed; (2) identification of the material on this site that you claim is infringing, with sufficient detail to locate it; (3) your contact information; (4) a statement that you have a good-faith belief that use of the material is not authorised by the copyright owner; (5) a statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorised to act on the owner's behalf. We will investigate all DMCA notices in good faith and respond promptly. If infringement is confirmed, the material will be removed.

content.heading: Trademarks
content.text: VeteransLedger and associated logos are trademarks of VeteransLedger. Historical symbols, insignia, and emblems reproduced on this site are used strictly for historical documentation and identification purposes. Their use does not imply any trademark right or affiliation, and their reproduction is for educational and archival purposes only.

content.heading: Responsibility for User-Submitted Content
content.text: Any content submitted to VeteransLedger by users — including contact form messages and removal requests — is used solely for the purpose for which it was submitted and is not published on the site. By submitting content to us, you confirm that you have the right to do so and that the content does not infringe any third-party rights.

content.heading: Contact for Permissions
content.text: For licensing enquiries, reproduction permissions beyond those described above, or any copyright-related questions, contact us at VeteransLedger@gmail.com. We aim to respond to all permissions requests within a reasonable time.
